The C++20 requires clause constraining the member.

## Signature

```typescript
requiresClause?: RequiresClauseDataModel | undefined;
```

## Remarks

Contains the requires clause expression that constrains the member when it is a template function or method. The linked text may include cross-references to concept definitions used within the constraint expression.
